carriedBehavior: Canonical marketplace source parsing, staging, validation, atomic activation, persistent indexing, plugin lookup, and safe removal live under runtime/src/plugins/marketplace; CLI/add operations use the same parser grammar for URL manifests, GitHub shorthand, SSH/file/git URLs, and local paths, and git clone transports reject non-loopback HTTP.
CLI and PluginInstallationManager marketplace methods call the canonical PK-07 layer directly.

Marketplace manager helpers cover config persistence, source registration/removal, cache refresh, plugin lookup, auto-update flags, policy allow/block matching, graceful loading degradation, and empty-state reason selection.
Marketplace manifest loading rejects malformed plugin entries, traversal sources, unsupported source shapes, and duplicate plugin names instead of silently dropping invalid catalog data.

Remote marketplace helpers cover authenticated listing, installed-plugin listing, detail and skill fetches, install/uninstall mutations, path-jailed local cache cleanup, remote installed-bundle reconciliation with stale-cache removal and in-flight cache mutation guards, and explicit JSON response-shape validation for current and legacy endpoints.

Remote bundle helpers validate release metadata and local plugin/marketplace cache identity segments, revalidate HTTPS/loopback policy at the download boundary, cap download/extracted sizes, reject path traversal, link, truncated, and checksum-corrupt tar entries, verify extracted plugin manifest identity, and activate versioned cache installs atomically.

Startup sync helpers refresh curated marketplace snapshots through guarded git first, then HTTP zipball, then backup archive, gate one-shot remote plugin reconciliation on local curated prerequisites, recover stale locks, wire the startup remote path to the concrete remote bundle reconciler when no injected sync callback is supplied, and degrade to existing validated snapshots when refresh fails.

Marketplace fetch guards centralize HTTPS/loopback policy, timeout/abort handling, stream cancellation on size-limit failures, bounded response reads, and credential-redacted URL error reporting for URL manifests, remote API JSON, remote bundles, and startup metadata.
intentionalReductions: Auth token vending remains outside PK-07; remote functions require caller-provided RemoteAuth headers and do not read API key environment variables directly.
Signed bundle verification is not invented in this row. PK-07 implements transport, path, and size safety, leaving signature policy to the later plugin security row.
Dependency solving, plugin demotion, and managed update orchestration are documented from inspected donors but are not wired into install/update decisions here.
UI refresh notification rendering and marketplace-specific TUI status transitions are reduced to runtime entry points that later UI rows can call.
The donor GCS mirror path is reduced to AgenC-owned agenc.tech startup HTTP and backup archive fallbacks; no donor bucket or donor product domain is retained.
Already-merged PK-06 CLI marketplace modules are not deleted. Live callers import the canonical PK-07 layer directly and no compatibility wrapper is added.

commands: npm exec --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime vitest run src/plugins/marketplace src/plugins/cli/pluginCliCommands.test.ts
evidence: runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/ contains counterparts for every PK-07 named donor file.
runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/marketplace.ts calls parseMarketplaceInput during addMarketplaceOp, so CLI/add source syntax cannot drift from parser tests.
runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/marketplace.ts enforces HTTPS/loopback policy on marketplace git clone URLs and plugin git source URLs before exposing installable sources.

runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/fetchGuards.ts provides shared timeout, stream cancellation, bounded read, URL policy, and redaction helpers used by URL manifests, remote APIs, bundles, and startup sync.

runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/remote.ts exposes syncRemoteInstalledPluginBundlesOnce/syncRemoteInstalledPluginBundles and markRemotePluginCacheMutationInFlight; regression tests install a remote bundle, remove stale cache entries, skip guarded cache mutations, and dedupe concurrent syncs by cache root.
runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/remote_bundle.ts rejects invalid backend-provided pluginName/marketplaceName cache identity segments before computing plugin IDs or install paths.
runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/startup_sync.ts applies HTTPS/loopback transport policy before any curated git ls-remote or clone command.

runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/startup_remote_sync.ts can run through the concrete remote bundle reconciler when callers provide RemotePluginServiceConfig/RemoteAuth instead of an injected sync callback.

runtime/src/types/upstream-ambient.d.ts is a narrow type-only contract for inherited upstream-mirror imports that are already in the tsc graph. It covers the exact inherited declaration gaps for src/entrypoints/agentSdkTypes.js, src/types/hooks.js, src/utils/model/model.js, src/utils/settings/constants.js, src/utils/settings/types.js, src/services/mcp/types.js, Bun.which/embeddedFiles, StructuredSerializeOptions.transfer, BodyInit, and OpenTelemetry forceFlush/shutdown provider methods without adding runtime compatibility exports or widening the typecheck baseline.
